title: Leuma
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Leuma''' was a virus invented by [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]]. He had a medical facility quarantined against the newly-discovered virus, which appeared to be either airborne or a spore.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Recovery]]'' {{1st}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
